features.title: Implement 'orch api status' command
features.description: Add dedicated command to check if 'orch serve' API is running. Uses port listening check on 3348 via net.Dial with short timeout. Separates infrastructure status from project server status.

features.title: Remove port 3348 from orch-go project allocations
features.description: Run 'orch port release orch-go api' to remove false coupling between project servers and infrastructure API. Prerequisite for feat-001.

features.title: Clean up tmuxinator template API comment
features.description: Remove the '# api server on port 3348' comment from pkg/tmux/tmuxinator.go:92-94 to eliminate confusion. The comment suggests tmuxinator manages the API server when it doesn't.

features.title: Document servers vs API infrastructure distinction
features.description: Update CLAUDE.md and README to clarify: 'orch servers' = project dev servers (ephemeral, tmux-managed), 'orch api' = orchestrator monitoring infrastructure (persistent, standalone).

features.title: Dashboard progressive disclosure: Active/Recent/Archive sections
features.description: Implement collapsible sections in swarm dashboard to group agents by recency and activity. Active (always expanded) shows agents with <10min activity. Recent (collapsed by default) shows idle/completed from last 24h. Archive (collapsed) shows older sessions. Store collapse state in localStorage. Update stats bar to show section counts. File targets: web/src/routes/+page.svelte (grouping logic), create CollapsibleSection.svelte component. Acceptance: Dashboard loads with only Active visible, sections expand/collapse smoothly, state persists across refreshes.

features.title: Add session deletion to 'orch clean' command
features.description: Extend 'orch clean' with '--sessions' flag to delete OpenCode sessions for completed agents. Requires confirmation prompt before deletion (destructive operation). Should only delete sessions for agents with SYNTHESIS.md or closed beads issues. Updates cmd/orch/main.go runClean() function. Out of scope: Bulk session management UI. Acceptance: 'orch clean --sessions' prompts for confirmation, deletes only completed agent sessions, updates dashboard in real-time.

features.title: Implement pkg/beads Go RPC client
features.description: Create pkg/beads/client.go with connection management to beads daemon socket. Pattern after beads internal/rpc/client.go. Include health checks, reconnect logic. Socket at .beads/bd.sock. Types from beads/internal/rpc/protocol.go. File targets: pkg/beads/client.go, pkg/beads/types.go. Out of scope: HTTP API, non-Go clients. Acceptance: Client connects to daemon socket, health check succeeds, types match beads protocol.

features.title: Migrate daemon.ListReadyIssues to beads RPC
features.description: Replace pkg/daemon/daemon.go:ListReadyIssues() subprocess call with pkg/beads client. Use OpReady operation. Fallback to CLI if daemon unavailable. Depends on feat-007. File targets: pkg/daemon/daemon.go, pkg/beads/ready.go. Acceptance: ListReadyIssues uses RPC when daemon available, falls back to CLI when not.

features.title: Migrate verify.GetIssue to beads RPC
features.description: Replace pkg/verify/check.go:GetIssue() subprocess call with pkg/beads client. Use OpShow operation. Handle comments via OpCommentList. Depends on feat-007. File targets: pkg/verify/check.go, pkg/beads/show.go. Acceptance: GetIssue uses RPC when daemon available, falls back to CLI when not.

features.title: Migrate serve beads calls to RPC
features.description: Replace cmd/orch/serve.go handleBeads() subprocess call with pkg/beads client. Use OpStats operation. Update BeadsAPIResponse to match. Depends on feat-007. File targets: cmd/orch/serve.go, pkg/beads/stats.go. Acceptance: handleBeads uses RPC when daemon available, falls back to CLI when not.
